internacional.title: Royal Navy's HMS Dragon forced to dock during Iran conflict deployment
internacional.description: The Type 45 destroyer was deployed to the Eastern Mediterranean to protect Britain's airbases after the conflict in Iran erupted but has now had to dock for maintenance [World news]
